content.query:
-- run data factory pipeline load_closedclaims_members and load_closedclaims_claims, then update empty strings to null in the load_closedclaims_members table for the following columns
-- load_closedclaims_claims still uses empty strings instead of null
 update [customer].[stg_closedclaims_members_t]
 set statecode = null
 where [statecode] = '';

 update [customer].[stg_closedclaims_members_t]
 set zip3value = null
 where [zip3value] = '';

 update [customer].[stg_closedclaims_members_t]
 set productcode = null
 where [productcode] = '';

--  SELECT TOP (1) *
--  FROM [customer].[stg_closedclaims_members_t]
--  where gendercode = '';

--  SELECT TOP (1) *
--  FROM [customer].[stg_closedclaims_claims_t]
--  where icdcmdxcode02 = '';

-- explore the data
select monthenddate, count(*)
from [customer].[stg_closedclaims_members_t]
group by monthenddate
order by 1;

select distinct ageatendyear
from [customer].[stg_closedclaims_members_t]
order by 1;

select distinct gendercode
from [customer].[stg_closedclaims_members_t]
order by 1;

select distinct raceethnicitycode
from [customer].[stg_closedclaims_members_t]
order by 1;

select distinct zip3value
from 
  [customer].[stg_closedclaims_members_t] a
order by 1;

select distinct a.zip3value
from 
  [customer].[stg_closedclaims_members_t] a
  left join (select distinct zip3 from dim.census_population_by_zip3_age_gender_t) z2
    on a.zip3_group = z2.zip3
where CHARINDEX('_', a.zip3value) = 0 and z2.zip3 is null;

select sum(case when CHARINDEX('_', a.zip3value) = 0 then 0 else 1 end), count(*),
  sum(case when CHARINDEX('_', a.zip3value) = 0 then 0 else 1.0 end) / count(*) 
from 
  [customer].[stg_closedclaims_members_t] a;

select * 
from [customer].[stg_closedclaims_members_t]
where zip3value like '%006%';


drop TABLE [opt].[closedclaims_members_max_age_by_gender_age_zip3_t];
CREATE TABLE [opt].[closedclaims_members_max_age_by_gender_age_zip3_t]
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
) AS
select 
  c.token, c.gendercode, c.raceethnicitycode, c.zip3value, max(c.ageatendyear) as max_ageatendyear
from 
  [customer].[stg_closedclaims_members_t] c
group by
  c.token, c.gendercode, c.raceethnicitycode, c.zip3value;

drop TABLE [opt].[closedclaims_members_latest_zip3value_t];
CREATE TABLE [opt].[closedclaims_members_latest_zip3value_t]
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
) AS
select distinct
  a.token, a.gendercode, a.raceethnicitycode, a.latest_zip3value, a.count_zip3value
from
  (
    select
      c.token, c.gendercode, c.raceethnicitycode, 
      FIRST_VALUE(c.zip3value) OVER (PARTITION BY c.token, c.gendercode, c.raceethnicitycode ORDER BY c.max_ageatendyear desc) as latest_zip3value,
      count(c.zip3value) OVER (PARTITION BY c.token, c.gendercode, c.raceethnicitycode) as count_zip3value
    from 
      [opt].[closedclaims_members_max_age_by_gender_age_zip3_t] c
  ) a
where
  a.count_zip3value > 1
;


-- counts of unique tokens and records
select count(distinct token), count(*)
from 
  [customer].[stg_closedclaims_members_t] a;
-- 68562663   467807193

-- records with the zip3 value as a group of ZIP3s
select count(*)
from 
  [customer].[stg_closedclaims_members_t] a
where CHARINDEX('_', a.zip3value) > 0
-- 216589443

-- tokens with multiple zip3 values for the same gender and race
select token, c.gendercode, c.raceethnicitycode, count(distinct zip3value) as cnt_distinct_zip3values
from [customer].[stg_closedclaims_members_t] c
group by token, c.gendercode, c.raceethnicitycode
having count(distinct zip3value) > 1;

select *
from [customer].[stg_closedclaims_members_t]
where token = '3AC6161BD0108AE2885C2C94B6E8338EF37A0EB101B24D02A28DA6E909E94EBB15C4EF14742DDEB5F7B7EFF3DC4CD51C';

select *
from [opt].[closedclaims_members_latest_zip3value_t]
where token = '3AC6161BD0108AE2885C2C94B6E8338EF37A0EB101B24D02A28DA6E909E94EBB15C4EF14742DDEB5F7B7EFF3DC4CD51C';

select *
from [customer].[stg_closedclaims_members_t]
where token = '1A6482AE5AFC7051E37B68B8F51E111CEC75AC83EDB53152D7318E1CC49A5BF78AE6867B67013CAE21F94BEC7F6725E3'
order by gendercode, raceethnicitycode, ageatendyear;

select *
from [opt].[closedclaims_members_latest_zip3value_t]
where token = '1A6482AE5AFC7051E37B68B8F51E111CEC75AC83EDB53152D7318E1CC49A5BF78AE6867B67013CAE21F94BEC7F6725E3';


-- create the initial optimizer table
drop TABLE [opt].[closedclaims_members_t];
CREATE TABLE [opt].[closedclaims_members_t]
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
) AS
select distinct
  c.token, 
  -- redact age
  case when c.ageatendyear >= 85 then 85 when c.ageatendyear <= 1 then 1 else c.ageatendyear end AS age,
  -- redact gender
  c.gendercode as gender,
  -- redact zip3
  case when z2.zip3 is null and CHARINDEX('_', coalesce(z1.zip3_to, a.latest_zip3value, c.zip3value)) = 0 then '000' else coalesce(z1.zip3_to, a.latest_zip3value, c.zip3value, '000') end AS zip3_group, 
  c.raceethnicitycode as race
from 
  [customer].[stg_closedclaims_members_t] c
  left join [opt].[closedclaims_members_latest_zip3value_t] a
    on c.token = a.token and c.gendercode = a.gendercode and c.raceethnicitycode = a.raceethnicitycode
  left join dim.zip3_pop_lt_20k_t z1
    on coalesce(a.latest_zip3value, c.zip3value) = z1.zip3_from
  left join (select distinct zip3 from dim.census_population_by_zip3_age_gender_t) z2
    on coalesce(z1.zip3_to, a.latest_zip3value, c.zip3value) = z2.zip3
;

-- select *
-- from [opt].[closedclaims_members_t]
-- where token = '3AC6161BD0108AE2885C2C94B6E8338EF37A0EB101B24D02A28DA6E909E94EBB15C4EF14742DDEB5F7B7EFF3DC4CD51C'
-- order by gender, race, age;

-- select *
-- from [opt].[closedclaims_members_t]
-- where token = '1A6482AE5AFC7051E37B68B8F51E111CEC75AC83EDB53152D7318E1CC49A5BF78AE6867B67013CAE21F94BEC7F6725E3'
-- order by gender, race, age;

-- check unknown percentage
select sum(case when age is null then 1.0 else 0 end), count(*), sum(case when age is null then 1.0 else 0 end) / count(*)
from 
  [opt].[closedclaims_members_t] a;
-- 0.0  467807193  0.000000

select sum(case when gender is null or gender = 'U' then 1.0 else 0 end), count(*), sum(case when gender is null or gender = 'U' then 1.0 else 0 end) / count(*)
from 
  [opt].[closedclaims_members_t] a;
-- 19531.0  467807193  0.000041

select sum(case when race is null or race = 'U' then 1.0 else 0 end), count(*), sum(case when race is null or race = 'U' then 1.0 else 0 end) / count(*)
from 
  [opt].[closedclaims_members_t] a;
--141385705.0  467807193   0.302230

select sum(case when zip3_group is null or zip3_group = '000' then 1.0 else 0 end), count(*), sum(case when zip3_group is null or zip3_group = '000' then 1.0 else 0 end) / count(*)
from 
  [opt].[closedclaims_members_t] a;
-- 519013.0  467807193  0.001109

-- more than 5000 tokens are duped, out of 467807193
select token, count(*)
from [opt].[closedclaims_members_t]
group by token
having count(*) > 1;

select *
from [opt].[closedclaims_members_t]
where token = 'CDDEC1DFBF6851C7EC3B183A5A4651C6181396825B569C9F6071F4278C14EFE3B437819490E8D2CCF97CDC594438CE4F';


-- Add generalization levels to the inovalon and HEII blended data
drop table opt.closedclaims_members_w_generalization_t;
create table opt.closedclaims_members_w_generalization_t 
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
) as 
select distinct 
  a.token, 
  a.age, 
  coalesce(b.age_lvl1, 'U') as age_lvl1, 
  coalesce(b.age_lvl2, 'U') as age_lvl2,
  a.gender, 
  a.race,
  a.zip3_group
FROM 
  opt.closedclaims_members_t a
  inner join dim.age_ranges_t b
    on a.age between b.age_lower_bound and b.age_upper_bound
;

select count(*) from opt.closedclaims_members_w_generalization_t ;
-- 467807193


-- calculate population at zip3 group level
drop table dim.census_population_by_zip3_group_age_gender_race_t;
create table dim.census_population_by_zip3_group_age_gender_race_t
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
) as 
with zip_groups as 
(
    select distinct
        a.zip3_group,
        s.value as zip3
    from 
        opt.closedclaims_members_w_generalization_t a
        CROSS APPLY STRING_SPLIT(a.zip3_group, '_') s
    where CHARINDEX('_', a.zip3_group) > 0
)
select 
  a.zip3_group, b.age, substring(b.gender, 1, 1) as gender, substring(b.race, 1, 1) as race, sum(b.population) as population
from
  zip_groups a
  inner join dim.census_population_by_zip3_age_gender_race_t b -- census ptc12
  on a.zip3 = b.zip3 
group by
  a.zip3_group, b.age, substring(b.gender, 1, 1), substring(b.race, 1, 1)
union all
select 
  a.zip3 as zip3_group, a.age, substring(a.gender, 1, 1) as gender, substring(a.race, 1, 1) as race, a.population
from dim.census_population_by_zip3_age_gender_race_t a -- census ptc12
-- order by 1, 2, 3, 4
;


select *
from dim.census_population_by_zip3_group_age_gender_race_t a
where zip3_group = '656_657_658' and age <= 3 and gender = 'F' and race = 'O'


drop table opt.closedclaims_members_ref_population_t;
create table opt.closedclaims_members_ref_population_t
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
) as 
with base as
(
  SELECT 
    a.zip3_group, gender, race, a.age, coalesce(b.age_lvl1, 'U') as age_lvl1, coalesce(b.age_lvl2, 'U') as age_lvl2, a.population
  FROM 
    dim.census_population_by_zip3_group_age_gender_race_t a
    left join dim.age_ranges_t b
      on a.age between b.age_lower_bound and b.age_upper_bound
  union all
  -- simulate population that is not in census data
  select 
    a.zip3_group, a.gender, a.race, a.age, a.age_lvl1, a.age_lvl2, count(distinct token) as population
  from 
    opt.closedclaims_members_w_generalization_t a
    left join (select distinct zip3_group from dim.census_population_by_zip3_group_age_gender_race_t) c
      on a.zip3_group = c.zip3_group
  where 
    c.zip3_group is null and a.zip3_group <> '000' and a.gender <> 'U' and a.race <> 'U'
  group by 
    a.zip3_group, a.gender, a.race, a.age, a.age_lvl1, a.age_lvl2
)
select 
  zip3_group, gender, race, a.age, age_lvl2, age_lvl1, population, 1 as data_grp
from base a
where a.age >= 0 and zip3_group <> '000' and gender <> 'U' and race <> 'U'
union all
SELECT 
  '000' as zip3_group, a.gender, a.race, a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1, sum(a.population) as population, 2 as data_grp
FROM base a
where a.age >= 0 and gender <> 'U' and race <> 'U'
group by 
  a.gender, a.race, a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1
union all
SELECT 
  a.zip3_group, 'U' as gender, a.race, a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1, sum(a.population) as population, 3 as data_grp
FROM base a
where a.age >= 0 and zip3_group <> '000' and race <> 'U'
group by 
  a.zip3_group, a.race, a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1
union all
SELECT 
  a.zip3_group, a.gender, 'U' as race, a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1, sum(a.population) as population, 4 as data_grp
FROM base a
where a.age >= 0 and zip3_group <> '000' and gender <> 'U'
group by 
  a.zip3_group, a.gender, a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1
union all
SELECT 
  a.zip3_group, a.gender, a.race, -1 as age, 'U' as age_lvl2, 'U' as age_lvl1, sum(a.population) as population, 5 as data_grp
FROM base a
where zip3_group <> '000' and gender <> 'U' and race <> 'U'
group by 
  a.zip3_group, a.gender, a.race
union all
SELECT 
  '000' as zip3_group, 'U' as gender, a.race, a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1, sum(a.population) as population, 6 as data_grp
FROM base a
where a.age >= 0 and race <> 'U'
group by 
  a.race, a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1
union all
SELECT 
  '000' as zip3_group, a.gender, 'U' as race, a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1, sum(a.population) as population, 7 as data_grp
FROM base a
where a.age >= 0 and gender <> 'U'
group by 
  a.gender, a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1
union all
SELECT 
  a.zip3_group, 'U' as gender, 'U' as race, a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1, sum(a.population) as population, 8 as data_grp
FROM base a
where a.age >= 0 and zip3_group <> '000'
group by 
  a.zip3_group, a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1
union all
SELECT 
  a.zip3_group, a.gender, 'U' as race, -1 as age, 'U' as age_lvl2, 'U' as age_lvl1, sum(a.population) as population, 9 as data_grp
FROM base a
where a.gender <> 'U' and zip3_group <> '000'
group by 
  a.zip3_group, a.gender
union all
SELECT 
  a.zip3_group, 'U' as gender, a.race, -1 as age, 'U' as age_lvl2, 'U' as age_lvl1, sum(a.population) as population, 10 as data_grp
FROM base a
where a.race <> 'U' and zip3_group <> '000'
group by 
  a.zip3_group, a.race
union all
SELECT 
  '000' as zip3_group, a.gender, a.race, -1 as age, 'U' as age_lvl2, 'U' as age_lvl1, sum(a.population) as population, 11 as data_grp
FROM base a
where a.gender <> 'U' and a.race <> 'U'
group by 
  a.gender, a.race
union all
SELECT 
  '000' as zip3_group, 'U' as gender, 'U' as race, a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1, sum(a.population) as population, 12 as data_grp
FROM base a
where a.age >= 0
group by 
  a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1
union all
SELECT 
  '000' as zip3_group, a.gender, 'U' as race, -1 as age, 'U' as age_lvl2, 'U' as age_lvl1, sum(a.population) as population, 13 as data_grp
FROM base a
where a.gender <> 'U'
group by 
  a.gender
union all
SELECT 
  '000' as zip3_group, 'U' as gender, a.race, -1 as age, 'U' as age_lvl2, 'U' as age_lvl1, sum(a.population) as population, 14 as data_grp
FROM base a
where a.race <> 'U'
group by 
  a.race
union all
SELECT 
  a.zip3_group, 'U' as gender, 'U' as race, -1 as age, 'U' as age_lvl2, 'U' as age_lvl1, sum(a.population) as population, 15 as data_grp
FROM base a
where a.zip3_group <> '000'
group by 
  a.zip3_group
union all
SELECT 
  '000' as zip3_group, 'U' as gender, 'U' as race, -1 as age, 'U' as age_lvl2, 'U' as age_lvl1, sum(a.population) as population, 16 as data_grp
FROM base a
;


-- claim dimension table for generalization levels with corresponding losses
drop table opt.closedclaims_members_feature_generalization_t;
create table opt.closedclaims_members_feature_generalization_t
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
) as 
select 'gender' as feature, null as column_name, null as ref_column_name, 0 as level, null as mask, null as generalization_in_src
union all
select 'gender' as feature, 'gender' as column_name, 'gender' as ref_column_name, 1 as level, 'U' as mask, null as generalization_in_src
union all
select 'zip' as feature, null as column_name, null as ref_column_name, 0 as level, null as mask, null as generalization_in_src
union all
select 'zip' as feature, 'zip3_group' as column_name, 'zip3_group' as ref_column_name, 1 as level, '000' as mask, null as generalization_in_src
-- loss and generalization for age
union all
select 'age' as feature, null as column_name, null as ref_column_name, 0 as level, null as mask, null as generalization_in_src
union all
select 'age' as feature, 'age_lvl1' as column_name, 'age_lvl1' as ref_column_name, 1 as level, null as mask, null as generalization_in_src
union all
select 'age' as feature, 'age_lvl2' as column_name, 'age_lvl2' as ref_column_name, 2 as level, null as mask, null as generalization_in_src
union all
select 'age' as feature, 'age' as column_name, 'age' as ref_column_name, 3 as level, null as mask, null as generalization_in_src
union all
select 'race' as feature, null as column_name, null as ref_column_name, 0 as level, null as mask, null as generalization_in_src
union all
select 'race' as feature, 'race' as column_name, 'race' as ref_column_name, 1 as level, 'U' as mask, null as generalization_in_src
;


-- set feature weights
select * from opt.closedclaims_members_feature_weight_t a;


-- insert into `development-de-id.development_xdaas.ino_heii_feature_weight_t`
-- values ('race', 1.0, 'All', 4);
-- update `development-de-id.development_xdaas.ino_heii_feature_weight_t` set number_of_features = 4 where number_of_features = 3;


drop table opt.closedclaims_members_high_risk_tokens_t;
create table opt.closedclaims_members_high_risk_tokens_t
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
) as 
with ref_tab as (     
  SELECT age AS age, race, gender, zip3_group as zip3, SUM(population) / COUNT(DISTINCT data_grp) AS population
  FROM opt.closedclaims_members_ref_population_t
  GROUP BY age, race, gender, zip3_group
  having SUM(population) / COUNT(DISTINCT data_grp) < 3
),
data_tab as
(     
  SELECT
    a.token, a.age as age, a.gender, a.race, a.zip3_group as zip3, b.population
  FROM opt.closedclaims_members_w_generalization_t a
    inner join ref_tab b
      on a.age = b.age and a.gender = b.gender and a.zip3_group = b.zip3 and a.race = b.race
),
high_risk_tab as (     
  SELECT 
    c.age, c.gender, c.race, c.zip3,
    count(distinct c.token) as cnt_patients
  FROM data_tab c
  group by c.age, c.gender, c.race, c.zip3
  having count(distinct c.token) < 3
)
SELECT distinct
  a.token, a.age, a.gender, a.race, a.zip3, b.cnt_patients, a.population,
  case when coalesce(a.population, 0) < 3 and b.cnt_patients < 3 then 'Yes' else 'No' end as high_risk
FROM 
  data_tab a
  inner join high_risk_tab b
    on a.age = b.age and a.gender = b.gender and a.zip3 = b.zip3 and a.race = b.race
;

select * from opt.closedclaims_members_high_risk_tokens_t;
